chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 616 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.2853/2024 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.2854/2024 12.01.2026 Mr. Naveed Ali advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Adeel Awan, advocate for the applicant Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Per joint request the impugned judgment is set aside and the matter is remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
